nameEn: Well of Yusuf at the Citadel
whyCandidateMatters: Well of Yusuf at the Citadel would broaden the project beyond the current 41-record set and improve district, type, or period coverage. Coverage value: this record would expand the Ayyubid layer in Cairo Citadel through a water infrastructure rather than duplicating an existing published monument.
knownResearchGaps: Confirm a direct monument-specific institutional or academic source.
